rawChanges.generatedNotes:
### New Features
- Added test mode support for composite fix types.
- Added autofix support for HTML scrollable elements.
- Added reporting slices to the payload for enhanced reporting capabilities.
- Added a healthcheck endpoint to the MCP server.

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where the trim function could conflict with Klarna's polyfill.
- Reverted the name to Modal_Usage_Cookie_Detect to restore expected behavior.
- Improved error handling around fixes to prevent unexpected failures.

### Improvements
- The server now gracefully handles transport errors instead of shutting down.
- Updated internationalization strings based on review feedback.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed a compatibility issue where the trim method could clash with the Klarna polyfill.
- Fixed the shell-docs container configuration.
- Reverted the component name back to Modal_Usage_Cookie_Detect.
- Fixed the shell tool build process.

### Improvements

- Added dist-tool output to the shell tool build.
- Added reporting slices to the payload.

Remove legacy localization code, collapse i18n event chain

rawChanges.generatedNotes:
### New Features
- MARS report is now produced and available for review.
- Added the ability to extract images from scanned content.
- Added a tool to view unfixed issues.

### Autofixes
- Added autofix for missing H1 headings.
- Added autofix to convert multiple H1 headings into H2s where appropriate.
- Added autofix for MenuItem with a missing parent element.
- fixTabset autofix is now scoped to anchor elements.

### Improvements
- Streamlined internationalization by migrating to i18next and removing legacy localization code.
- Localizations are now checked directly into the codebase for improved reliability.

### Bug Fixes
- OSS control buttons now remain visible in mobile maximized view.

### New Features

- Added autofix for missing H1 headings.
- Added autofix to convert duplicate H1 headings to H2s.
- Added autofix for MenuItem with a missing parent element.
- You can now generate and access the MARS report.
- Added a tool to view unfixed issues.
- Added image extraction support.
- Added MCP server for the scanner bundler.

### Improvements

- Removed legacy localization code and simplified the internationalization event chain.
- Migrated locale files to i18next and checked localizations directly into the codebase.
- Removed the locize dependency.
- Centralized accessibility engine blocking code for consistency.
- Scoped fixTabset behavior to anchor elements.
- Restored webpack-compatible build for the browser module system.
- Open-source control buttons now remain visible in mobile maximized view.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed two CVEs related to fast-xml-parser.
- Fixed shell server export.
- Fixed shell tool build.

### Infrastructure

- Bumped multer and other dependencies.
- Bumped flatted from 3.3.3 to 3.4.1 in /packages/a11y-docs-site.
- Reworked Docker builds to use a build-tag-push workflow.
- Added magic version flags to Dockerfiles.
- Updated Docker publish process for new images.
- Added Docker export for a11y-docs-site.
- Updated bug report form.
- Removed extra publish_stage script.
- Updated Slack channel ID in workflow.

rawChanges.name: Week of March 2, 2026
rawChanges: Fix invalid selector query crash in site-menu and carousel
Fix the logic of loading RTE
add nonRulesAutoFixesAllowList to prodconfig types so mono prodConfig can include it
Hotfix: Fix JavaScript freezing on pages with region-qualified lang codes
remove ruleTestReport from fake report server
rawChanges.generatedNotes:
### New Autofixes

- Added autofix for Yotpo and Google review star rating patterns.
- Added autofix for missing footer landmark.
- Added autofix for buttonRoleMissing.
- Added autofixes for HTMLTabable and ManualCursorFocus issues.
- Added autofix for Google Translate missing labels and region.
- Added autofix for missing SVG accessible names.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed a crash caused by an invalid selector in site-menu and carousel components.
- Fixed an issue with heading sequence validation.
- Fixed the loading logic for real-time effects.
- Fixed JavaScript freezing on pages with region-qualified language codes (e.g., `en-US`).

### New Auto-Fixes

- Added auto-fix for Yotpo, Google Review, and star rating patterns.
- Added auto-fix for missing footer landmarks (manualFooterLandmarkMissing).
- Added auto-fix for missing button roles (buttonRoleMissing).
- Added auto-fixes for HTMLTabable and ManualCursorFocus issues.
- Added auto-fix for Google Translate missing labels and region issues.
- Added auto-fix for missing SVG names (SVGNameMissing).
- Added auto-fix for invalid heading sequences.
- Enabled auto-fix support in the Sg scanner.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed a crash caused by an invalid selector query in site-menu and carousel components.
- Fixed an issue where JavaScript could freeze on pages using region-qualified language codes.
- Fixed the logic for loading real-time effects (RTE).

### Improvements

- Added nonRulesAutoFixesAllowList to production config types to support mono production config usage.
- Migrated build tooling to Rolldown.

### Removals

- Removed the example audiocontrols auto-fix.
- Removed ruleTestReport from the internal report server.

rawChanges.generatedNotes:
### Accessibility Rules

#### Improvements
- Updated the logic and behavior of the Link_AdjacentHref_Redundant rule.
- Added autofix support for missing iframe name attributes.
- Added IIFE export type for rule factories, supporting additional integration methods.

#### Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where automatic remediation was incorrectly applied to Optimizely links.

---

### Site Menu

#### Bug Fixes
- Fixed right-to-left (RTL) text alignment by correctly inheriting direction in the CSS reset.
- Fixed cross-frame behavior, keyboard navigation, and Alt+M shortcut issues in the site menu.

---

### HelpDesk

#### New Features
- Added RTL (Hebrew) language support for HelpDesk.

#### Bug Fixes
- Fixed a broken translation in the HelpDesk screen reader container.

---

### Internationalization

#### Improvements
- Improved performance by skipping CDN fetches for English locale files.

### New Features

- Added RTL (Hebrew) language support for HelpDesk.
- Added autofix support for missing iframe name attributes.
- Added IIFE export type for rules factories.

### Improvements

- Updated the Link_AdjacentHref_Redundant rule logic for more accurate detection.
- English locale files are now loaded locally instead of fetched from the CDN, improving performance.
- Removed the minimum version check on the bundler.
- Added documentation covering autofix contents.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed RTL text alignment by correctly inheriting direction in the CSS reset.
- Fixed site-menu issues with cross-frame behavior, keyboard navigation, and the Alt+M shortcut.
- Fixed a broken translation in the HelpDesk screen reader section.
- Fixed Optimizely links being incorrectly modified by auto-remediation.

rawChanges.generatedNotes:
### New Features

- Introduced the Carousel component with automatic accessibility fixes.
- Added an autofix for invalid ARIA roles.
- Added an autofix for missing button roles.
- Added the ability to fill in missing metadata.

### Improvements

- Skip link now responds to both click and keyboard events.
- Rules configuration loading is now deferred for improved reliability.
- Separated fix failure and issue failure validation for clearer error reporting.
- Source fix rules no longer emit unfixed problem notifications.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed site menu behavior.
- Fixed the Carousel not being included in the release package.
- Fixed rules files not being included in the package.

### New Features

- Added a new Carousel component and FixCarousel for carousel-related accessibility fixes.
- Added an autofix for invalid ARIA roles.
- Added a buttonRoleMissing autofix.
- Added the ability to fill in missing metadata for accessibility issues.
- Added a helper function for inserting ARIA live regions for real-time effects fixes.

### Improvements

- Rules configuration loading is now deferred to improve startup reliability.
- Fix failures and issue validation failures are now reported separately for clearer diagnostics.
- Skip link auto-remediation now supports both click and keyboard events.
- Added Playwright testing infrastructure for autofixes, with initial test coverage.
- Improved detection of regressions.
- Reorganized autofixes into their own folders for better project structure.
- Added a11ytesting 11x version npm alias for autofixes.
- Cleaned up validation tests.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed an issue with the site menu.
- Fixed release and publish processes to correctly include the Carousel component.
- Rules files are now properly included in the published package.
- Source fix rules no longer incorrectly emit unfixed problem reports.

### Documentation

- Fixed the anatomy proposed document.
- Updated the DAD documentation.

### Dependency Updates

- Updated 7 packages in the npm and Yarn dependency group.

- Converted the WCAG package to a library with locked versions.

### Infrastructure

- Disabled automatic GitHub changelog creation.
- Private packages are now automatically excluded from releases.
- Turned off caching for copy-dist-files.

rawChanges.generatedNotes:
### New Features

- Added the Locize Translation Launcher for improved internationalization support.

### Improvements

- `setHideFromAT` now applies `aria-hidden="true"` for more reliable assistive technology hiding.
- Release notes in the documentation sidebar now sort with the latest versions first.
- When smart rems is turned off in product configuration, the system no longer plans a smart rems patch.
- Reports are no longer emitted unless explicitly triggered by the server.
- Exported common types to ensure API code generation works correctly.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed the accordion example in the documentation.
- Fixed missing package references.
- Fixed open-source highlighting for rules version 10.4 and above.

### Security

- Resolved tar and wrangler vulnerabilities.
- Updated npm in the bundler-nestjs package to address a glob vulnerability.

### Build & Infrastructure

- Created a generator to standardize builds across packages.
- Switched top-level dist setup to use an nx plugin.
- Inverted dist symlink setup and added `preserveSymlinks` support.
- Standardized the overall build setup.
- Added node externals to builds.
- Switched a11y-active-scanner, a11y-rules-framework, a11y-rules-tools, a11y-rules-test-helpers, a11y-rules-helpers, and a11y-rules-composite-fixes to use rollup instead of api-extractor.
- Switched package manager to yarn.
- Removed the jsdom-based accessibility rule test framework.
- Removed the compatibility/polyfill build for rules.
